reviews.author: De'Andrez Voltage
reviews.text: All I can say is Ms. Chrissy did an amazing job with the exterior detailing of my sister car. She notice the soap stains from tint installation. She said the car can’t leave like that and instantly got right to detailing the car. She’s great at what she does. We need to support our fellow females in the community so please don’t hesitate and book your next appointment with her asap.

reviews.author: Ashley Green
reviews.text:
Chrissy’s Mobile Detailing is top-tier!
She recently did the tint on my car, and I couldn’t be happier with the results. Super clean, professional, and detailed work, she really takes pride in what she does. Everything looks flawless, and the whole process was smooth from start to finish. Highly recommend her if you want quality work and great customer service!

reviews.author: Marcelle Zavala
reviews.text: I am so happy to have found Chrissy. She detailed my boyfriend’s car as my Christmas gift to him, and did a phenomenal job. She was communicative, efficient, and so detail oriented. His car underwent a massive transformation, he had stains on his seats that she was able to remove so well. I would recommend her to everyone!! Thank you Chrissy!

reviews.author: Dominik Austin
reviews.text: The detail I got was for a Toyota Corolla, at first she did a good job since I had asked for a deep cleaning on the interior of a pretty stained interior. She told me the price of the whole detail which came out to be $285. Which is not bad but not great of a price consider the final result I received. We had stopped to check in and she got most of the stains out of the seats which was my main issue, but after the full inspection of the vehicle the next morning… the interior had a major strong chemical smell which wasn’t pleasant to breath in and also they left a lot of missed spots such as, dirty glass, streaky plastic center console, and some other stuff. The exterior of the vehicle still had lots of dirt marks on it which I could scratch off with my nails. Also the interior roof wasn’t even touched it still had stains that water and soap could come off and they didn’t even look at that, I only saw it the next day. Not even sure if they cleaned my wheels and applied tire shine on it after. Overall I wouldn’t consider booking them again especially for the price and the service I got. I wouldn’t recommend them.

reviews.author: Emilie Scheffer
reviews.text:
Chrissy did such an incredible job on my car!! It had been through a lot with my two dogs and a baby but it looked like a brand new car by the time she was done.
Highly recommend her detailing services!

notes: Captured via Places API on 2026-04-17. Mac Mini direct (Bruce cron stuck).
